# General Settings

Configure workspace-level preferences including timezone, units, and display options.

## Timezone

Set your workspace timezone to ensure accurate scheduling and time displays. All job times and technician availability are shown in this timezone.

## Workspace Management

Manage workspace settings at **Settings > General**:
- Workspace name and description
- Default views and display preferences
- Notification preferences
